stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Determine if the CG % MAC position at the Zero Fuel Mass (ZFM) is in limits, given:

Take-off Mass: 61 080 kg
Zero Fuel Mass: 49 000 kg
Take-off Fuel 12 080 kg
Fuel index: -6.9
Zero fuel index: 70.0

options.a: Yes, it is within limits and located at an aft CG position.
options.b: Yes, it is within limits and located at a forward CG position.
options.d: The CG position can not be calculated.
